programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: As Meg continues the search for her mum in Cairns, Lucky tries to lay low to avoid his dubious past.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Lucky and Meg head out of Cairns, but Lucky's best forgotten past catches up with him.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Wounded in the rainforest, Lucky is desperate to return to civilisation, but Meg wants to push on as they get close to finding her mother.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Meg and Lucky finally make it to the Wellfulness Commune, but don't get the reception they were expecting.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Trapped at the Wellfulness Commune, Lucky starts to unravel its secrets as Meg finally gets the chance to speak to her mother.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: After escaping the commune, Lucky and Meg race back to Sydney hoping to make it in time to meet Billie at the airport.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Years after his adventure with Meg, Lucky struggles to adjust to his new life as a successful musician and it's not long before Meg comes bursting back into his chaotic world.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Beginning their search in Queensland for Meg's mum, Lucky struggles to manage his relationship back home as Meg is startled by someone who followed her from Karingunna.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: The story of how E. Howard Hunt and G. Gordon Liddy, architects of the infamous Watergate break-in, accidentally toppled Nixon's presidency.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: While Hunt and Dorothy entertain Liddy and his wife Fran at their exclusive country club, their kids Lisa and Saint John paint a less-than-perfect portrait of the family.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.sub-title: Don't Drink The Whiskey At The Watergate
programme.desc: Hunt, Liddy, and the Cubans attempt to break into the DNC offices at the Watergate to plant listening devices for the White House.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: Reeling from the arrests at the Watergate, Hunt enlists Saint John's help to dispose of evidence, while Liddy warns the acting Attorney General that the burglaries can be tied back to President.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: Amid rumours of the White House's involvement, Liddy shares his concerns about Hunt's stability with John Dean and tries to make a deal. When the president resigns, lives are ruined.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Chronicling the rise and fall of the Baltimore Police Department's Gun Trace Task Force, examining the corruption and moral collapse that befell an American city.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: During his first days on the job, Jenkins learns the true weight of city politics in policing. Jensen and Sieracki interview an eager to talk Jemell Rayam about the GTTF's tactics.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Despite growing complaints, Hersl is placed on the GTTF. Later, the unit's supervisor, Sgt Thomas Allers, is interrogated about stolen cash.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Jenkins pivots after a high-speed car chase yields no drugs. During his interview with the Feds, former officer Maurice Ward recalls how Jenkins remained unscathed despite a series of illegal incidents.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Jensen, Sieracki, and US Attorney Leo Wise prepare to charge the officers of the GTTF. Suiter feels the distrust of Baltimoreans as he begins to sense that his past is closing in on him.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: After the arrest of several GTTF officers, Suiter grows concerned about his subpoena. Jenkins learns his fellow officers are cooperating with the investigation as the full extent of his crimes comes to light.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Chronicling the rise and fall of the Baltimore Police Department's Gun Trace Task Force, examining the corruption and moral collapse that befell an American city.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: During his first days on the job, Jenkins learns the true weight of city politics in policing. Jensen and Sieracki interview an eager to talk Jemell Rayam about the GTTF's tactics.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Despite growing complaints, Hersl is placed on the GTTF. Later, the unit's supervisor, Sgt Thomas Allers, is interrogated about stolen cash.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Jenkins pivots after a high-speed car chase yields no drugs. During his interview with the Feds, former officer Maurice Ward recalls how Jenkins remained unscathed despite a series of illegal incidents.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Jensen, Sieracki, and US Attorney Leo Wise prepare to charge the officers of the GTTF. Suiter feels the distrust of Baltimoreans as he begins to sense that his past is closing in on him.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: After the arrest of several GTTF officers, Suiter grows concerned about his subpoena. Jenkins learns his fellow officers are cooperating with the investigation as the full extent of his crimes comes to light.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: Chronicling the rise and fall of the Baltimore Police Department's Gun Trace Task Force, examining the corruption and moral collapse that befell an American city.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: During his first days on the job, Jenkins learns the true weight of city politics in policing. Jensen and Sieracki interview an eager to talk Jemell Rayam about the GTTF's tactics.

programme.title: AFL: St Kilda v Fremantle
programme.desc: Fresh off a Ross Lyon spray, the Saints are keen to redeem themselves as they host the Dockers under lights.

programme.title: AFL: St Kilda v Fremantle
programme.desc: Fresh off a Ross Lyon spray, the Saints are keen to redeem themselves as they host the Dockers under lights.

programme.title: AFL: Western Bulldogs v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: The Bulldogs return to their home away from home in Ballarat to face the Power to kick off a monster Super Saturday.

programme.title: AFL: Western Bulldogs v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: The Bulldogs return to their home away from home in Ballarat to face the Power to kick off a monster Super Saturday.

programme.title: AFL: Adelaide v Carlton
programme.desc: Carlton had a statement win over Geelong in Round 7. Next up, a trip to Adelaide to face the Crows.

programme.title: AFL: Adelaide v Carlton
programme.desc: Carlton had a statement win over Geelong in Round 7. Next up, a trip to Adelaide to face the Crows.

programme.title: Fox Footy Legends: Cripps
programme.desc: Relive the best games and magic moments from the stars of our great game.

programme.title: Fox Footy Legends: Cripps

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 1983 GF HAW v ESS
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 1983 GF HAW v ESS

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R1 2003 MEL v HAW
programme.desc: At the MCG the Demons looked to have the Hawks measure, leading by three goals at three-quarter time. But in a 30 Minute Thriller, 10 goals are kicked at the home of football as the game goes right down to the wire.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R1 2003 MEL v HAW
programme.desc: At the MCG the Demons looked to have the Hawks measure, leading by three goals at three-quarter time. But in a 30 Minute Thriller, 10 goals are kicked at the home of football as the game goes right down to the wire.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Steve Johnson
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Steve Johnson
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2013 R19 PA v ADE
programme.desc: 2013, Round 19. The Showdowns between Adelaide and Port Adelaide are essential viewing every year, but this one is right up there with the best, including a goal - and a finish - that lived on long after the final siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2013 R19 PA v ADE
programme.desc: 2013, Round 19. The Showdowns between Adelaide and Port Adelaide are essential viewing every year, but this one is right up there with the best, including a goal - and a finish - that lived on long after the final siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1993 R6 GEE v ESS
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1993 R6 GEE v ESS
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2005 SF SYD v GEE
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2005 SF SYD v GEE
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2016 GF WB v SYD
programme.desc: The 2010s - With two new teams, a drawn grand final and plenty of new talent, it was certainly a decade of spellbinding AFL football.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: SF 2005 Sydney v Geelong
programme.desc: In 2005 it looked like the Cats would be a premiership threat and many had them penciled in to knock off the Swans and move to the prelims. But the Sydney grit and Nick Davis come to the fore in this 30 Minute Thriller.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: SF 2005 Sydney v Geelong
programme.desc: In 2005 it looked like the Cats would be a premiership threat and many had them penciled in to knock off the Swans and move to the prelims. But the Sydney grit and Nick Davis come to the fore in this 30 Minute Thriller.

programme.title: Game of the Year: 1986 EF FIT v ESS
programme.desc: AFL has produced many memorable games over it's history, Fox Footy have narrowed it down to the best game of each year.

programme.title: Incredible Comebacks: 1994 R7 SYD v STK
programme.desc: Is there anything better than when a team looks down and out but then suddenly they flip the script and stage an incredible comeback, here are some of the best.

programme.desc: Each week, Dermie Delivers the best games, from the biggest names. This episode, The Dominant Debuts, features Adrian McAdam and Marlion Pickett.

programme.desc: Two teams coming off a red-hot start to the AFLW season as Melbourne hosts St Kilda at Casey Fields.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Time runs short. Susan makes excuses over road sweeping, Julian Clary wields a fishing rod, and Lucy Beaumont asks Alex Horne to sit on a sled.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Time runs short. Susan makes excuses over road sweeping, Julian Clary wields a fishing rod, and Lucy Beaumont asks Alex Horne to sit on a sled.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike has a strange vision for his restoration of a very rare 1971 Super Bee, and an even stranger desire to spend big money on a second, nearly identical car.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike has a strange vision for his restoration of a very rare 1971 Super Bee, and an even stranger desire to spend big money on a second, nearly identical car.

programme.title: Hotel Paranormal
programme.desc: A security guard chases down a mysterious intruder at an isolated luxury hotel, an otherworldly creature follows two hikers back to their hotel room and a widow is accosted by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Hotel Paranormal
programme.desc: A security guard chases down a mysterious intruder at an isolated luxury hotel, an otherworldly creature follows two hikers back to their hotel room and a widow is accosted by a demonic entity.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: Two British passenger planes, nearly identical, named the Star Tiger and the Star Ariel, vanish in the 1940s. The team targets an unidentified wreck that might be the Star Ariel.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: Two British passenger planes, nearly identical, named the Star Tiger and the Star Ariel, vanish in the 1940s. The team targets an unidentified wreck that might be the Star Ariel.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four blade smiths are in for a hands on challenge when they are tasked with forging pry bar knives.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: At the Big Sac party Colette tries to impress Noa before his window closes. Barb's attempt to save the DMV backfires until Sally steps in.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: At the Big Sac party Colette tries to impress Noa before his window closes. Barb's attempt to save the DMV backfires until Sally steps in.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In the finale, Sam Campbell designs a bikini, Sue Perkins forgets milk, Lucy Beaumont feeds her young, Susan pairs odd foods, and Julian Clary acts out.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In the finale, Sam Campbell designs a bikini, Sue Perkins forgets milk, Lucy Beaumont feeds her young, Susan pairs odd foods, and Julian Clary acts out.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny feels nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not be a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny feels nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not be a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod takes Brandi to an auction on her birthday, Darrell tries to find another 'All Ten' locker, Rene stands his ground to protect his honour, and Mary brings in her pal from Texas.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Trucking veteran Steve Grahame's heading to the beach, but it's no vacation. The coast is 600km away at the very top of Australia and Steve must conquer the treacherous Gibb River Road to get there.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Trucking veteran Steve Grahame's heading to the beach, but it's no vacation. The coast is 600km away at the very top of Australia and Steve must conquer the treacherous Gibb River Road to get there.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Todd Dewey must fix his truck or be stranded 160km from the nearest town. Alex Debogorski confronts a creek that's thawed in the middle of the road.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: The Glovers race to get their wood and machines off Erie Mountain before government road restrictions shut them down for spring. At Saddle Ridge, Craig's crew is rushing to get the stranded wood off the landing.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Ask not what your Pawn Stars can do for you, when the guys get a chance to own JFK's personal cigar box. Will the guys light up at the opportunity or will negotiations go up in flames?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get by with a little help from the Pawn Stars when alternative artwork for Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band rocks into the shop. Will the guys twist and shout for this piece of music history?

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: Melissa Torgeson and Peter Reid's home was destroyed in a fire. They've designed and bought a ready to move home that Kelly and the movers will have to be careful not to damage.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: The Oyen Historical Society has enlisted the help of the team to deliver their beloved church to a museum site. The stakes are high when delivering this 100-year-old house of God.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross joins experts Tim Weeks and Charles Hanson at The Ardingly Antiques and Collectors Fair. The reds and blues go head-to-head to find some bargains that they hope will make a profit at auction.

programme.desc: Charlie Ross joins experts Tim Weeks and Charles Hanson at The Ardingly Antiques and Collectors Fair. The reds and blues go head-to-head to find some bargains that they hope will make a profit at auction.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Twenty-two-month-old Daisy arrives at St George's by air ambulance. The accident happened at her family's stables in Sussex and mum Georgie was so shocked she fainted at the scene.

programme.desc: Twenty-two-month-old Daisy arrives at St George's by air ambulance. The accident happened at her family's stables in Sussex and mum Georgie was so shocked she fainted at the scene.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh, items include a priceless football cup, rare Russian royal jewels and an ornately carved Maori feather box.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles and Natasha shop for more antiques in Yorkshire in the third phase of their journey. However, it is not going to be an all-work-and-no-play scenario.

programme.title: DIY SOS The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in.

programme.title: DIY SOS The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah is in Shropshire with a garlic specialist and his wife who want to establish a new business that taps into the county's food scene, but not before securing their dream home on a 550,000-pounds budget.

programme.desc: Sonali Shah is in Shropshire with a garlic specialist and his wife who want to establish a new business that taps into the county's food scene, but not before securing their dream home on a 550,000-pounds budget.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It is week three and the potters are back for more tough tests of their ceramic skills. They are playing with fire in their main make, when judges Kate and Keith ask them to make 10 identical long-necked vases.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It is week three and the potters are back for more tough tests of their ceramic skills. They are playing with fire in their main make, when judges Kate and Keith ask them to make 10 identical long-necked vases.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Once their kids fled the coop, Tony and Wendy decided to sell their house to finalise their separation. Can the team bring this house back to the 21st century and help the family close this chapter of their lives?

programme.desc: Briony May Williams helps a couple swap busy Kent life for Suffolk's open countryside and a home with space for their hobbies.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Marc Allum is intrigued to see a set of blue beads given as a gift from the Zulu ruler King Cetshwayo to the royal naval surgeon who treated him after the Anglo-Zulu Wars.

programme.desc: Anita Manning presents from Leominster with experts Gary Pe and John Cameron. The reds and blues battle it out, hoping to bag themselves a bargain and make a profit at auction.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We revisit Robin and Colin nearly 10 years after their search for an architectural gem. Meanwhile, we catch up on the joys and difficult times of the past seven years with Lia and Andrew.

programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: The Star
programme.desc: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the first Christmas.

programme.title: The Star
programme.desc: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the first Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas on Division Street
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Christmas on Division Street
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: After years of missing family gatherings, event planner Whitney is off to spend Christmas with Grandma Frances. But in an unfortunate turn of events, Whitney throws out a box of precious family ornaments.

programme.title: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: After years of missing family gatherings, event planner Whitney is off to spend Christmas with Grandma Frances. But in an unfortunate turn of events, Whitney throws out a box of precious family ornaments.

programme.title: Christmas on the Vine
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Christmas on the Vine
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In this futuristic action, it's been 25 years since a wall was built around Scotland to halt the Reaper virus. Now, London's in danger and a cure must be found while up north anarchy is rife.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In this futuristic action, it's been 25 years since a wall was built around Scotland to halt the Reaper virus. Now, London's in danger and a cure must be found while up north anarchy is rife.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a half-striped zebra embarks on a daring quest to earn his stripes but finds the courage and self-acceptance to save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a half-striped zebra embarks on a daring quest to earn his stripes but finds the courage and self-acceptance to save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: The Colours Within
programme.desc: A girl who can see colours in people's hearts joins a band with two other people.

programme.title: The Colours Within
programme.desc: A girl who can see colours in people's hearts joins a band with two other people.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Through comic mayhem from the White House to the heartland, four slayers face off against new kinds of evolved zombies and new human survivors.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Through comic mayhem from the White House to the heartland, four slayers face off against new kinds of evolved zombies and new human survivors.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Fat Pizza vs Housos
programme.desc: When a pizza chef is released from prison after 15 years, the only shop he can afford is in a housing commission suburb. Cult TV classics collide in this riotous tale.

programme.title: Fat Pizza vs Housos
programme.desc: When a pizza chef is released from prison after 15 years, the only shop he can afford is in a housing commission suburb. Cult TV classics collide in this riotous tale.
